name: 企查查
description: Query and verify corporate registration information. Supports shareholder structure, actual controllers, beneficial owners, executive teams, external investments, financial data, annual reports, and listing information — complete corporate identity verification and background checks through natural language.
description_zh: 查询和核实企业工商登记信息。支持股东结构、实际控制人、受益所有人、高管团队、对外投资、财务数据、年报及上市信息查询，用自然语言快速完成企业身份核验与背景调查。
description_en: Query and verify corporate registration information. Supports shareholder structure, actual controllers, beneficial owners, executive teams, external investments, financial data, annual reports, and listing information — complete corporate identity verification and background checks through natural language.
examples_zh: 帮我查下"企查查科技股份有限公司"的股东结构和实际控制人
核实一下"企查查科技股份有限公司"的法定代表人和统一社会信用代码是否匹配
examples_en: Look up the shareholder structure and actual controller of Qichacha Tec Co., Ltd.
Verify whether the legal representative and Unified Social Credit Code of Qichacha Tec Co., Ltd. match.
